gist.headline: A fresh face for AssemblyAI
gist.blurb: We've added the official AssemblyAI logo to the dashboard. Now their transcription models look as good as they listen.
gist.summary: Added the AssemblyAI brand logo to the dashboard's model list.
gist.impact: Users will now see the official AssemblyAI logo next to their transcription models in the dashboard.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee hanging up a new logo sign on a dashboard wall, representing the addition of the AssemblyAI brand asset to the UI.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, proudly hanging a new glowing brand logo sign on a wooden dashboard wall. A chunky retro monitor robot stands nearby holding a clipboard, looking excited. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
